era_context: Early Iron Age II. Ashurnasirpal II is in the final years of his reign (he dies c. 859 BCE, so this is mid-reign). Egypt under the 22nd Dynasty is consolidating power under Shoshenq I. In China, the Western Zhou Dynasty is stable. This is a period of Assyrian imperial expansion and Egyptian internal reorganisation.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Specific events for this year are poorly documented

events.title: Ashurnasirpal II's military campaigns (general period, specific year undocumented)
events.description: Ashurnasirpal II continues his military campaigns during this period. While no specific events are documented for 905 BCE, the broader context of his reign (883–859 BCE) involves systematic conquest and consolidation of Assyrian power in the Near East. The campaigns establish Assyrian hegemony and set the template for Neo-Assyrian imperial administration. This entry is included to acknowledge the broader historical context rather than to claim specific knowledge of 905 BCE.
events.certainty_note: No specific events are documented for 905 BCE. This entry represents the broader context of Ashurnasirpal II's reign. The year is assigned by convention within his reign period (883–859 BCE), but no contemporary source specifically attests to events in 905 BCE.

disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. The absence of specific documentation for 905 BCE is not itself disconfirming; it reflects the limitations of the historical record.
historiographic_note: 905 BCE is poorly documented in surviving sources. The Assyrian annals do not provide detailed year-by-year accounts for every year of Ashurnasirpal II's reign. Egyptian sources are similarly sparse. The historical record for this year is essentially a blank. This illustrates a fundamental challenge in ancient chronology: the assumption that every year is equally documented is false. Many years in antiquity are simply not recorded in surviving sources, and honest historical research must acknowledge this rather than fabricate details.

graph_edges.note: Continuation of the broader campaign programme of Ashurnasirpal II's reign
